title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese describes four rules that Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei use to decide what products to build with Claude. Marchese presents this as a framework for individuals and businesses to avoid building the wrong things, whether for side projects, startups, or internal tools.
